name: get_user_vehicles
description: Retrieves the list of vehicles registered to the user's account. Returns information about vehicles that the user has added to their profile, including vehicle details needed for parking reservations and payment. This enables users to manage and view their registered vehicles.

platform.description: The geographiBLALBLA region for which to retrieve vehicles (e.g., 'europe')

useServerSearch.description: Whether to use server-side search functionality (optional, defaults to true)
